Q：英雄自選劵揀咩英好?
A：有愛>一切
依隻驚無勁唔勁，只有夾唔夾
同埋官方會因應英雄強弱而作出Buff同Nerf嘅調整
今個版本可能弱勢啲，但下個版本可能變神角都未定
所以不如揀咗有邊隻英係你真係鍾意嘅，想用嘅
再係Post度問下有咩組合可以夾佢，咁會比較好
相信各巴絲都好樂意為新手巴絲們解答的

Q：我抽到依樣嘢又唔係專武，咁係咩嚟?
A：Artifact
英文版：https://maskofgoblin.netlify.com
殘中版：http://bbs.ngacn.cc/read.php?tid=12943067


Q：需唔需要刷首抽架？
A：無首抽依回事，因為唔係抽返嚟，係可以直接用英雄自選卷換返嚟(新英除外)
【新手一定會有一張二星同三星英雄自選劵】

[Maintenance Notice] 22nd March 2018

https://www.plug.game/kingsraid/1030449/posts?menuId=1#/posts/9811



Dear Raiders

This is GM Orvel

We will be undergoing maintenance on Thurs, 22nd March

Please check more details below.

[Maintenance Schedule]

Duration: Thurs, 22nd March

America Server: 01:00-06:00 (UTC -4)

Asia Server: 12:00-17:00 (UTC+7)

EU Server: 06:00-11:00 (UTC +1)

[Maintenance Details]

▶Updates on Hero's Inn / Arena Shop / Unique Weapon Ticket

- Sonia, Mirriane, Scarlet will appear at Hero's Inn.

- Requina, Ezekiel, Ophelia's Unique Weapon will be added at Arena Shop & Unique Weapon Ticket.

▶Hero's Unique Treasures

- New Accessory (Treasure) slot will be added.

- Unique Treasures (52 kinds) and 1 Common Treasure will be added.

- You can acquire a Treasure via Special Item Summon.

- You can also obtain a Treasure via League of Honor.

▶Class Unique Weapons

- T10 Class Unique Weapons will be added. (7 Types)
- Class Unique Weapon system is added to support easier game play and growth
before having Hero's Unique Weapon.

- Class Unique Weapons have lower stats compared to Hero's Unique Weapon.
- You can acquire Class Unique Weapon via Special Item Summon.
- You can obtain a Class Unique Weapon with higher chance than Hero's Unique Weapon.
:: It does not affect the drop rate for Hero Unique Weapons/Artifacts
- Class Unique Weapons can be upgraded to the level of your max level hero in the class.

(Lower level heroes won't be able to equip it.)

- Class Unique Weapon's ATK is lower than Hero's Unique Weapon.

- A Class Unique Weapon has 3 Options: ATK / DEF / HP increase.

- A Class Unique Weapon has 3 Rune Slots.

▶New Content

- A New Party System will be added which will allow you to form a party for
Chapters, Conquests, and Upper Dungeons.

- Record Room will be added which will allow you to check your play records and statistics.

- Emojis will be added that you can use in Chat Window.

▶ Hero Balance Patch

- Mirriane, Nyx, Lewisia, Viska

▶Revamps & Adjustments

- Menu background images will be changed for some content

:: Forge, Tower of Challenge, World Tree, Hall of Heroes, Arena, Hero's Inn, Orvel Castle,
Stockade, Central Orvel

- Chapter 4, 6 World Map, Upper Dungeon images will be changed

- World Boss Balance Adjustment: Protianus

- Display UI change on 'Currently Owned Rubies'.

:: It will be categorized in 2 types of rubies: Paid Rubies (Purchased)
/ Free Rubies (Acquired from gameplay)

- 28 Day Attendance Board Revamp

:: Your attendance progress will be maintained. Only reward details will be changed

- A Reward will be added on the New Attendance Board.

:: 1,000,000 Gold will be added to Day 1 reward.

- After the update, you will be able to make purchases even on Guest account.

- Japanese Voice version will be added.

- A button will be adedd where you can check Service Terms & Conditions
/ Privacy Policy (Settings - Other)

▶Bug Fixes

- A bug will be fixed where tutorial button position was abnormal in 18:9 resolution

- A bug will be fixed where heroes' moving animation was lagging while moving.

- A bug will be fixed where some heroes' skill effects were not working properly.

- A bug will be fixed where tutorial tooltips were displayed even to the users
who had finished Chapter.1 tutorial.

▶Special Shop Item Revamps

- Daily Ruby 1 & 2 packages can be purchased also with Lua's Token.

:: Please be aware that you CANNOT purchase the same Daily Ruby package more than once.
(If you purchase Daily Ruby 1 with Lua's Token, you cannot buy Daily Ruby 1 with Cash)

:: Lua's Token Daily Ruby packages do not include Bonus Rubies.

Details might be changed prior to the maintenance

We will bring more details via the Patch Note

Thank you

GM Orvel

The Transcendence Day

[Event Details]

1. Period: Thurs, 22nd March after maintenance – Sun, 8th April 23:59:59
2. Details: Get various rewards upon awakening your heroes: From 4 star to T5!
3. Rewards:

[Event Notes]
- If you have acquired a hero by using 5 Star / T1 Hero Ticket,
it’s not part of the event achievement.
- Acquire a hero with a ticket, and you will have to awaken/transcend the hero
for the achievements.
- Only heroes who are awakened/transcended during the event period
will be accepted as achievements.
- Event rewards will be sent to your mailbox, and unclaimed rewards cannot be
reclaimed/recovered.

Juno’s Special Meal Event★



[Event Details]

1. Period: Thurs, 22nd March after maintenance – Wed, 28th March 23:59:59
2. Details: Log into the game on the designated hours 4 times a day and acquire rewards!

[How to attend the event]

1. Log into King’s Raid, and attend a battle at least 1 time
(Except Arena, Friendly Duel, Story Mode)
2. Open the web-view window at designated hours:
Breakfast / Lunch / Dinner / Late-night snack

3. Acquire rewards accordingly!!

[Event Rewards]



So, if you acquire all meals,
You are getting total 900 Stamina!!

[Event Notes]

- You must clear at least 1 battle after logging into the game
- The event resets at every midnight
- You must click the web- view event page to acquire the rewards

reclaimed/recovered

Thank you
GM Orvel
